title: Sqlitelogictest - Omitting AS in a result set column alias name
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(pk INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col0 INTEGER, col1 FLOAT, col2 TEXT, col3 INTEGER, col4 FLOAT, col5 TEXT);
SELECT - col4 [AS] col0 FROM tab0 WHERE NOT NULL IS NULL;
SELECT - col4 col0 FROM tab0 WHERE NOT NULL IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Omitting AS in column alias name causes errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER, salary FLOAT, active BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO tab1(name, age, salary, active) VALUES('Alice', 30, 70000.00, TRUE);
INSERT INTO tab1(name, age, salary, active) VALUES('Bob', 25, 50000.50, FALSE);
SELECT - salary col1 FROM tab1 WHERE age IS NULL;
SELECT - salary AS col1 FROM tab1 WHERE age IS NULL;
